question: show me top 5 products by category
generated_sql:
WITH RankedProducts AS (
    SELECT
        pc.category_name,
        pp.product_name,
        pp.list_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pc.category_id ORDER BY pp.list_price DESC) as rn
    FROM
        production_products AS pp
    JOIN
        production_categories AS pc ON pp.category_id = pc.category_id
)
SELECT
    rp.category_name,
    rp.product_name,
    rp.list_price
FROM
    RankedProducts AS rp
WHERE
    rp.rn <= 5
ORDER BY
    rp.category_name, rp.list_price DESC;

question: show all products
generated_sql:
SELECT
  product_id,
  product_name,
  brand_id,
  category_id,
  model_year,
  list_price
FROM production_products;

question: show me all top 5 products
generated_sql:
SELECT
  product_id,
  product_name,
  brand_id,
  category_id,
  model_year,
  list_price
FROM production_products
ORDER BY
  list_price DESC
LIMIT 5;
